title: Cassuvium walkeri
taxonomy: Cassuvium walkeri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane or oleander family. It belongs to the genus Cassuvium, which is a monotypic genus containing only one species. This plant is native to India and is often found in tropical and subtropical regions.
